zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie於大約1400年出生在蘇格蘭費伏格倫洛斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland31歲，母親Marjory Boswell7歲。他於1417年與Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾鮑登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie于大约1400年出生在苏格兰費伏格倫洛斯时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland31岁，母亲Marjory Boswell7岁。他于1417年与Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie在英国苏格兰斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛包爾鮑登。

nameMeanings.name: Sibbald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian) and northern English: from the Middle English and Scots personal name Sybald, Sibald (Old English Sǣbeald, from sǣ ‘sea’ + beald ‘brave’, or more likely Sigebeald, with sige ‘victory’ as the first element). The name was reinforced in the early Middle Ages by the Norman introduction of an ancient Germanic cognate, in its French form Sibaud.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie was born about 1400, in Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland, was 31 and his mother, Marjory Boswell, was 7. He married Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie in 1417, in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1451, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie est né environ 1400, à Glenrothes, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marjory Boswell, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie en 1417, à Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Bowden, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie um 1400 in Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland 31 und seine Mutter Marjory Boswell 7. Er hat 1417 in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1451 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie è nato il circa 1400 nel Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Boswell, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie nel 1417, nel Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1451, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonieが約1400年にスコットランドフィフグレンロススで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotlandは31歳，母Marjory Boswellは7歳であった。1417年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカレンダー パークでBaroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年に故郷で52歳で死去し，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアボウデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie(이)가 대략 1400년 스컷랜드 피프 글렌로트스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Boswell(은)는 7세였다. 그는 1417년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 캘렌더르 박에서 Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 보우든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Glenrothes, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Boswell, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie em 1417, em Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sibbald Of Balgonie родился около 1400 г. в местности гленротесь, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Sibbald of Balgonie - Treasurer of Scotland было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marjory Boswell, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie в 1417 г. в местности каллендар парк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1451 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности боуден, роксбургшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Baroness of Balgonie Joan Livingston baroness of balgonie en 1417, en Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1451, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Bowden, Roxburghshire, Scotland.
